VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Gemma 3 Technical Report" is confirmed real at arXiv:2503.19786, published March 25, 2025. The cited authors match the actual author list — the first author is listed as "Gemma Team" followed by Aishwarya Kamath, Johan Ferret, Shreya Pathak, etc., which aligns with the citation. This is a large collaborative paper using a team name as shorthand, which is acceptable per the evaluation criteria.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.19786
